---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Edgar Jacob"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Edgar Jacob

**Dates:** (1844-1920)

### Description

Bishop of Newcastle, then St. Albans

### Biography

Educated at New Coll, Oxford,  he was Chaplain to Bishop of Calcutta 1872-6, vicar of Portsea from 1878, hon. canon of Winchester 1884, Bishop of Newcastle 1895, then St. Albans 1903.  He was third son of the Rev. Dr. Philip Jacob of Crawley, Hants and Anna Sophia Noel.  He never married.  His sister Edith Jacob founded the Society of Watchers and Workers. [<i>Alumni Oxonienses;  Clergy List</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from July 17 [1900]
- Letter from [May 1876]
- Letter from July 18th 1871
- Letter from Sept 21 [1868[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
